page_content:
ENBC - Biocomputational Engineering

ENBC301 Introduction to Biocomputational Engineering (1 Credit) Provides practical tools to help Biocomputational Engineering majors to think critically about their goals and career paths and to utilize their major to set their career trajectory.

Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Fischell Department of Bioengineering department; and must be in Biocomputational Engineering major.
